Moving Cost Calculator

Estimate your total moving costs. Enter your move details to get a cost breakdown for local or long-distance moves.

FAQ

How much does it cost to move?

Local moves average $1,400-$2,500. Long-distance moves (1,000+ miles) average $4,500-$7,500 depending on home size and distance.

What factors affect moving cost?

Distance, home size (number of rooms), weight of belongings, time of year, and additional services like packing or storage.

When is the cheapest time to move?

Moving in winter (October-April) and mid-month on weekdays is typically 20-30% cheaper than summer weekends.
